issues.description: Trigger should be 'Activated' with cost specification, not bare 'Activated'. The cost 'rest this Character' must be encoded in the effect structure or as a precondition.
Rest action is a cost, not an effect action. It should be represented as a cost field on the Activated trigger, not as an action in the effects array.
Target should specify '[Charlotte Linlin]' card name restriction. Current 'ChooseOwnCharacter' lacks the card name filter. Should be target with cardName='Charlotte Linlin' constraint.
Duration 'EndOfTurn' is correct for 'during this turn', but text says 'during this turn' which is '[Your Turn]' scope - should be 'DuringYourTurn', not 'EndOfTurn'.
Second effect with trigger 'Trigger' and action 'PlaySelf' is unexplained and does not match card text. Card text only describes the activated ability; there is no self-play trigger.
